creator: kristinacors
caption: If NYC feels overwhelming to plan, this is for you. I created a 7 day New York City itinerary linked in my bio. This itinerary gives you 4 aesthetic, well thought out spots per day, all grouped by location so you’re not zig zagging across the city. Every route is mapped with walk and drive times included, so you can actually enjoy NYC instead of stressing about logistics. #travelbucketlist #travelseries #nycitinerary #travelcontentcreator #nychiddengems

transcription.text: If you're planning a trip to New York City and this is your aesthetic, you need my seven-day New York City itinerary. I know what you're thinking, why should I buy it when I could just chachapiti way to go? Here's why. Number one, it's going to save you so much time and energy. Even if you ask chachapiti, you can't guarantee every single spot has the exact aesthetic and it factor you're looking for. Number two, you're getting 28 hand-picked spots. That's four incredible places to hit every day. And it's a perfect mix of cafes, jazz bars, speakeasies, secret gardens, restaurants, and more. Number three, each day is curated around a vibe and a neighborhood. Like the hottest party spots in Soho or speakeasies in the north side that even locals don't know about. That way you maximize your time in each area instead of wasting it Ubering all over the city. And here's the real difference. These are all places I've personally gone to. They're curated through years of being a New Yorker and taking my friends and knowing exactly which spots will be beautiful. So if you want seven days of unforgettable New York City experiences, head to my profile, click the link in my bio and shop my New York City itinerary.
